meaning: n.省(一个国家的大行政区)
examples: Guerrilla groups are active in the province.
The province is heavily forested and sparsely populated.
The economy of the province was atypical because it was particularly small.
Each year, the Peruvian province of Chumbivilcas hosts the vibrant Christmastime festival of Takanakuy.
The flash in the sky was also seen from Kanchanaburi province to the west of the capital.
